<ul><li>Enemy <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion">champions</a></span> and large <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monsters"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monsters</a></span> will spawn a <i>Mist Wraith</i>.</li>
<li>Epic <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monsters"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monsters</a></span> will spawn 2 <i>Mist Wraiths</i>.</li>
<li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">Minions</a></span> and lesser <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monsters"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monsters</a></span> that <b>Senna</b> kills have a 10% chance to spawn a <i>Mist Wraith</i>.</li>
<li>Large <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span> that <b>Senna</b> does not kill will always spawn a <i>Mist Wraith</i>, while lesser <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span> and lesser <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monsters"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monsters</a></span> that <b>Senna</b> does not kill have a 28% chance to spawn one.</li>
<li>Lesser minions executed by an allied champion's <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Support_Quest" title="Named item effect">Support Quest</a> item have a 8.<small>4</small>% chance to spawn a <i>Mist Wraith</i>.</li></ul></div>

<div class="ability-info-description no-stats"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Mist</b></span>: For each stack of <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span>, <b>Senna</b> gains <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">0.<small>75</small> <b>bonus</b> attack damage</span></span>. For every 20 stacks, she also gains <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> 20 <b>bonus</b> attack range</span> and <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/15px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/30px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orangered; white-space:normal">10% critical strike chance</span></span>. Additionally, every <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;"><span style="color:orangered; white-space:normal">1% critical strike chance</span></span> in excess of <span style="color:orangered; white-space:normal">100%</span> is converted into 0.<small>35</small>% <span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> life steal</span></span>.</div>

<div class="ability-info-icon"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Senna_Absolution_2.png?ab1f4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span></div>
<div class="ability-info-description no-stats"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Innate - Relic Cannon</b></span>: <b>Senna's</b> basic attacks <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting">on-hit</a></span> deal <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">20% AD</span> <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal"><b>bonus</b> physical damage</span> and grant her <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal"><span class="pp-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-bot-values="10;15;20" data-top-values="1;6;9" data-bot-key="%">10% / 15% / 20% (based on level)</span> of the target's movement speed</span> as <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal"><b>bonus</b> movement speed</span></span> for 0.<small>5</small> seconds. The damage <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Applies lifesteal"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal">applies</a></span> <span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> life steal</span></span> at 100% effectiveness.</div>

</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Info</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"><div class="infobox"><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Targeting input</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><a href="/en-us/Passive_and_active_spell" title="Passive and active spell">Passive</a></div></div><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Affects</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Self, Enemies</div></div></div></div><div class="infobox-header">Counters</div><div class="infobox-section-cell"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Spell shield</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability will not be blocked by spell shields. • Edge of Night • Banshee's Veil • Nocturne's Shroud of Darkness • Sivir's Spell Shield"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Spell_Shield_Grey.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Not Blocked</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Parries</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability has a special interaction with effects that mitigate basic attacks. See the notes for more details. • Nilah's Jubilant Veil • Jax's Counter Strike • Shen's Spirit's Refuge • Teemo's Blinding Dart"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Spirit%27s_Refuge_Partly.png?284ac" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>See Notes</span></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li>If a target's mark has a remaining duration less than 0.<small>25</small> seconds, and <b>Senna</b> starts her basic attack windup on the target during this time, the mark's duration will be modified to 0.<small>75</small> seconds. Subsequent windups on the marked target will refresh this modified duration if the previous attack windup did not complete.</li>
<li>Despite <b>Senna</b> dealing 1 damage to <i>Mist Wraiths</i>, attacking them will calculate the <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">attack's damage</span> (including <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Critical strike"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/20px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/40px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Critical_strike">critical strike</a></span> modifiers) and any <a href="/en-us/On-hit" class="mw-redirect" title="On-hit">on-hit</a> effects for the purposes of <span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> life steal</span></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Drain"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Vamp"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Drain" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png/20px-Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png?fb3f8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png/40px-Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png?fb3f8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Vamp">drain</a></span> effects.</li>
<li><i>Relic Cannon</i> is only applied if the attack deals more than 0 damage.
<ul><li>Hence, it is not applied if the target is <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invulnerable"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Invulnerability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invulnerability" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/20px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/40px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Invulnerability">invulnerable</a></span> or <b>Senna's</b> basic attack's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">attack damage</span></span> is reduced to 0 or below.</li>
<li>The bonus damage is also not applied against <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Structures"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Category:Structure"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Structure" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Structure_icon.png/20px-Structure_icon.png?41191" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Structure_icon.png/40px-Structure_icon.png?41191 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Category:Structure">structures</a></span> (regardless of their vulnerability).</li></ul></li>
<li>Dealing 0 damage is valid for marking and collecting <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span> from champions, but dealing no damage at all is not.
<ul><li>Hence, <b>Senna</b> can mark and collect from <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invulnerable"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Invulnerability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invulnerability" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/20px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/40px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Invulnerability">invulnerable</a></span> enemies.</li>
<li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">Dodge</a></span> prevents marking and collecting a <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span> via <b>Senna's</b> basic attacks and <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Piercing Darkness" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Piercing_Darkness"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Piercing Darkness" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png/20px-Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png?e75f9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png/40px-Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png?e75f9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Piercing_Darkness">Piercing Darkness</a></span></span>.</li>
<li><span style="color:red; font-family:math; font-weight:bold; font-size:1em;" title="Pending for test"><span class="fas fa-vial"></span>PENDING FOR TEST:</span>: <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span> interaction with <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">block</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect">blind</a></span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Nunu" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Nunu"><img alt="An icon representing Nunu" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Nunu_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Nunu_OriginalSquare.png?ef0fa" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Nunu_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Nunu_OriginalSquare.png?ef0fa 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Nunu">Nunu & Willump</a></span></span> spawn a wraith each.</li>

</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Tips & Tricks</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">
<ul><li>At high enough attack speed, and assuming <b>Senna</b> is at her max attack range when killing a unit that spawns a <i>Mist Wraith</i>, she can collect it before they leave her attack range at all.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>

<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"> 
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Swiftplay"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Swiftplay"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Swiftplay" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png/20px-Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png?7a043" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png/40px-Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png?7a043 2x" data-file-width="100" data-file-height="100"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Swiftplay">Swiftplay</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/swift?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Mist Wraith <span class="inline-image label-after" style="display:inline;color:#E2BA3D;white-space:pre;text-shadow:-1px 0 black,0 1px black,1px 0 black,0 -1px black;" data-param=""><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Gold" title="An icon representing Gold"><img alt="An icon representing Gold" src="/en-us/images/Gold_colored_icon.svg?103a5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="48" data-file-height="48"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;">gold</span></span> earned is <b>ignored</b> by the Swiftplay-specific bounty comeback system.</li></ul>
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="One for all"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/One_For_All"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword One for all" src="/en-us/images/thumb/One_for_All_Mirror_Mode_Icon_profileicon.jpg/20px-One_for_All_Mirror_Mode_Icon_profileicon.jpg?c7be6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/One_for_All_Mirror_Mode_Icon_profileicon.jpg/40px-One_for_All_Mirror_Mode_Icon_profileicon.jpg?c7be6 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/One_For_All" class="mw-redirect">One for All</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/ofa?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Wraiths are not shared.</li>

See the notes for more details. • Edge of Night • Banshee's Veil • Nocturne's Shroud of Darkness • Sivir's Spell Shield"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Spell_Shield_Partly.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>See Notes</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Parries</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Missing_role.png/66px-Missing_role.png?f30f7" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="66" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Missing_role.png/132px-Missing_role.png?f30f7 2x" data-file-width="500" data-file-height="423"></span></span><br>Missing</div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Projectile</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This projectile-like effect will bypass Yasuo's Wind Wall, Braum's Unbreakable, Samira's Blade Whirl, and Mel's Rebuttal."><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Projectile_Grey.png?6c022" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Not Blocked</span></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li>The ability's cast time respects the attack speed <a href="/en-us/Attack_speed" title="Attack speed">floor and cap</a>.</li>
<li><i>Piercing Darkness</i> also applies most <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-attack" src="/en-us/images/On-attack_icon.svg?88ec8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking">on-attack</a></span> effects to one enemy champion struck, and ocassionally to two.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">(unexpected)</span></sup>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Hail of Blades" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades"><img alt="An icon representing Hail of Blades" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/20px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/40px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades">Hail of Blades</a></span></span> will spend a stack on hitting a champion with <i>Piercing Darkness</i> but only if <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Hail of Blades" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades"><img alt="An icon representing Hail of Blades" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/20px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/40px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades">Hail of Blades</a></span></span> was activated first by an auto-attack.</li></ul></li>
<li><b>Senna</b> can generally target anything that is not either explicitly <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetable"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect">untargetable</a></span> or herself.
<ul><li>Valid targets include anything that can be targeted by a basic attack from someone.</li></ul></li>
<li><i>Piercing Darkness</i> respects all <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Turret"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Turret"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Turret" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Turret_icon.png/20px-Turret_icon.png?74c22" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Turret_icon.png/40px-Turret_icon.png?74c22 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Turret">turret</a></span>-specific rules when striking them.</li>
<li>On-hit effects are applied in order of struck units' spawn IDs. This matters for effects that are consumed on-hit (e.g. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spellblade"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Spellblade"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spellblade" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sheen_item.png/20px-Sheen_item.png?2bece" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sheen_item.png/40px-Sheen_item.png?2bece 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Spellblade">Spellblade</a></span>), which are applied to the target with the lowest <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">Spawn ID</span>.
<ul><li>"Spawn ID" is an unofficial abbreviation to describe the spawn order for all units at the start of a game, below are some examples.</li>
<li>If <b>Senna</b> targets an enemy champion but hits at least one more enemy champion simultaneously, <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Press the Attack" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Press_the_Attack"><img alt="An icon representing Press the Attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Press_the_Attack_rune.png/20px-Press_the_Attack_rune.png?27055" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Press_the_Attack_rune.png/40px-Press_the_Attack_rune.png?27055 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Press_the_Attack">Press the Attack's</a></span></span> first stack will be applied to that target. If no champion was targeted, it will default to the champion with the lowest Spawn ID out of the ones struck by the ability. Whether the effect stacks up on a champion or not when multiple enemy champions are stuck also depends on Spawn ID.</li>
<li>If <i>Piercing Darkness</i> struck an enemy champion and turret simultaneously, with <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Rapid Firecannon" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Rapid_Firecannon"><img alt="An icon for the item Rapid Firecannon" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Rapid_Firecannon_item.png/20px-Rapid_Firecannon_item.png?0cc9f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Rapid_Firecannon_item.png/40px-Rapid_Firecannon_item.png?0cc9f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Rapid_Firecannon">Rapid Firecannon</a></span></span> fully charged, the passive effect will most likely trigger on the turret since towers are often spawned before champions.</li></ul></li>
<li>For on-attack effects, they are also applied in order of struck units' spawn IDs. However, there are some specific on-attack effects that will apply to both the target of <i>Piercing Darkness</i> and the target with the lowest <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">Spawn ID</span> if the two unit is not identical.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">(unexpected)</span></sup> <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">Confirmed cases</span>:
<ul><li><a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Energized" title="Named item effect">Energized</a> effects are stacked twice the amount.</li>
<li><span style="color:red; font-family:math; font-weight:bold; font-size:1em;" title="Pending for test"><span class="fas fa-vial"></span>PENDING FOR TEST:</span></li></ul></li>
<li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield">Spell shield</a></span> will not prevent on-hit effects from being applied.</li>
<li><span style="color:red; font-family:math; font-weight:bold; font-size:1em;" title="Pending for test"><span class="fas fa-vial"></span>PENDING FOR TEST:</span> <i>Piercing Darkness</i> interaction with <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">dodging</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">blocking</a></span>, and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect">blinding</a></span> effects.</li></ul>
<div style="clear:both"></div>

			<div class="tabbertab" data-title="Tips & Tricks " data-hash="Tips_&_Tricks_" style="display: none;">
				<p class="mw-empty-elt"> 
</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Tips & Tricks</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">
<ul><li>Because <b>Senna's</b> windup percent scales down with levels but her windup time also only scales with 60% of attack speed bonuses, the precise numbers get complicated quickly.
<ul><li>At base attack speed and level 1, <b>Senna's</b> attack windup is 0.5 seconds.</li>
<li>A reduced formula for calculating <i>Piercing Darkness' </i>cast time at a given attack timer is <b>80% of</b> [ 0.5 + 0.1875 × (1 ÷ <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal"><b>total</b> attack speed</span> − 1 ÷ 0.5) ] seconds.</li>
<li>The cast time equals <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">0.<small>264</small> seconds</span> (which is the standard for most abilities in <i>League of Legends</i>) at approximately <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">204.<small>3</small>% <b>bonus</b> attack speed</span> (as of <a href="/en-us/V25.10" title="V25.10">V25.10</a>).</li>
<li>Reducing <b>Senna's</b> attack speed via <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cripple"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cripple"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cripple" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cripple_icon.png/20px-Cripple_icon.png?7014c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cripple_icon.png/40px-Cripple_icon.png?7014c 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Cripple" class="mw-redirect">attack speed reductions</a></span> also increases <i>Piercing Darkness' </i>cast time by 60% of the amount.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul></li></ul>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
			</div>

After a brief moment, the Black Mist spreads out from the target, briefly <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Root"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Root"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Root" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/20px-Root_icon.png?80b80" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/40px-Root_icon.png?80b80 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Root" class="mw-redirect">rooting</a></span> them and surrounding enemies.  </div><div class="ability-info-content"><div class="ability-info-row">

<div class="ability-info-description"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <b>Senna</b> throws a globule of Black Mist in the target direction that deals <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span> to the first enemy hit and attaches to them for 1 second.</div>

<div id="tabber-b81763c2a5cedd815d1760e8089955af" class="tabber tabberlive"><ul class="tabbernav"><li class="tabberactive"><a alt="Hide " data-hash="Hide_" href="#">Hide </a></li><wbr><li><a alt="Details " data-hash="Details_" href="#">Details </a></li><wbr><li><a alt="Tips & Tricks " data-hash="Tips_&_Tricks_" href="#">Tips & Tricks </a></li><wbr><li><a alt="Map-Specific Differences " data-hash="Map-Specific_Differences_" href="#">Map-Specific Differences </a></li><wbr></ul>

</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Info</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"><div class="infobox"><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Targeting input</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><a href="/en-us/Targeting#Auto" title="Targeting">Auto</a></div></div><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Affects</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Self</div></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li>Allies affected by the <i>Curse of the Blast Mist</i> aura receive a buff called <i>Cloak of Mist</i>.</li>
<li>Obscured units appear as <i>Wraiths</i>, hence the name. The wraith model does not distinguish which champion is obscured.
<ul><li>On the <a href="/en-us/Map_(League_of_Legends)" class="mw-redirect" title="Map (League of Legends)">mini-map</a>, obscured champions will be displayed as wraith icons instead of champion icons to the enemy team.</li></ul></li>
<li>In-game, the 'Cloak of Mist' buff grants camouflage and the 'Wraith Form' buff obscures the unit and grants movement speed. However, 'Cloak of Mist' has the unspecified effect of negating the obscuring effects of 'Wraith Form' (i.e. the unit is not a wraith while inside the mist); the unit has the bonus movement speed even when they are not a wraith (e.g. inside the mist or an enemy is nearby); and 'Wraith Form' also grants the functionality of camouflage (i.e. the unit is treated as a camouflaged unit with regards to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">True Sight</a></span>, <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Control Ward" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Control_Ward"><img alt="An icon for the item Control Ward" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Control_Ward_item.png/20px-Control_Ward_item.png?dae36" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Control_Ward_item.png/40px-Control_Ward_item.png?dae36 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Control_Ward">Control Wards</a></span></span>, and enemy <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion">champions</a></span>).
<ul><li>Given this overly complex interaction between the two buffs granted as well as the overlapping effects, it is easier to describe the effects as a single buff that is modified in specific circumstances rather than trying to establish a new game mechanic.</li>
<li><b>Senna</b> likewise has her aura buff and the 'Wraith Form' buff, but her 'Wraith Form' does not share gameplay functionality with other allies benefiting from Wraith Form. For <b>Senna</b>, the appearance of being a wraith is a form-swap while camouflaged (similar to <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Evelynn" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Evelynn"><img alt="An icon representing Evelynn" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Evelynn_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Evelynn_OriginalSquare.png?1ed7f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Evelynn_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Evelynn_OriginalSquare.png?1ed7f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Evelynn">Evelynn's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Evelynn" data-ability="Demon Shade" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Evelynn#Demon_Shade"><img alt="An icon for Evelynn's ability Demon Shade" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png/20px-Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png?09c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png/40px-Evelynn_Demon_Shade.png?09c84 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Evelynn#Demon_Shade">Demon Shade</a></span></span></span>). <b>Senna</b> will remain in her wraith form when she is detected so long as the camouflage effect isn't broken, and her wraith's appearance is very distinct from other wraiths.</li></ul></li>
<li>Allied champions who enter the mist and have <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stealth"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stealth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/20px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/40px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth">stealth</a></span> of their own will still gain the <i>Wraith Form</i> buff but they will not grant <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Obscured vision"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#Obscured_vision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Obscured vision" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sweeper_Drone_icon.png/20px-Sweeper_Drone_icon.png?6e3eb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sweeper_Drone_icon.png/40px-Sweeper_Drone_icon.png?6e3eb 2x" data-file-width="80" data-file-height="80"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#Obscured_vision">obscured vision</a></span> of themselves to the enemy while out of the mist nor will they appear as a <i>Wraith</i>.
<ul><li>Allies who have their own <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Camouflage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Camouflage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/20px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/40px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage">camouflage</a></span> and also have <i>Wraith Form</i> will be revealed to enemies from their stealth's detection range, not <i>Wraith Form's</i>.</li></ul></li>
<li>If <b>Senna</b> gains <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invisibility"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Invisibility"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invisibility" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/20px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png/40px-Akali_Twilight_Shroud_old2.png?fa652 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Invisibility">invisibility</a></span> while <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Camouflage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Camouflage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/20px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Twitch_Ambush_3.png/40px-Twitch_Ambush_3.png?cb228 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth#Camouflage">camouflaged</a></span> by <i>Curse of the Black Mist</i>, the visual effects of her aura will be hidden while she is invisible.</li>
<li><i>Curse of the Black Mist</i> will not activate if <b>Senna</b> enters <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Resurrection"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death#Ways_to_prevent_death_when_reaching_zero_health"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Resurrection" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/20px-Revival_icon.png?4c111" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/40px-Revival_icon.png?4c111 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death#Ways_to_prevent_death_when_reaching_zero_health">resurrection</a></span> during the cast time.</li>
<li><i>Wraith Form</i> will not be granted to allies that are in a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Zombie state"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death#Zombie_states"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Zombie state" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Zombie_icon.png/20px-Zombie_icon.png?e263b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Zombie_icon.png/40px-Zombie_icon.png?e263b 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death#Zombie_states">zombie state</a></span> or are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Channel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Channel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Channel" src="/en-us/images/Channeling_icon.svg?d2ab8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Channel">channeling</a></span>. It will be granted to allies even if they are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetable"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect">untargetable</a></span>.</li>
<li>Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the start of the attack windup.
<ul><li>The stealth regain timer is refreshed from basic attacks at the start of their attack windup.</li></ul></li></ul>
<div style="clear:both"></div>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
			</div>
			<div class="tabbertab" data-title="Tips & Tricks " data-hash="Tips_&_Tricks_" style="display: none;">
				<p class="mw-empty-elt"> 
</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Tips & Tricks</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">
<ul><li>Because of its duration, <i>Curse of the Black Mist</i> can be utilized in conjunction with <span class="inline-image label-after buff-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-buff="Homeguard" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Homeguard"><img alt="An icon representing the Homeguard neutral buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/20px-Ghost.png?ee615" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/40px-Ghost.png?ee615 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Homeguard">Homeguard</a></span></span> when exiting the base, and importantly early in the lane.
<ul><li>This is at the cost of mana, some of which will regenerate during the walk. Mana is consumed upon finishing the cast, so alternatively the caster can remain in base to regenerate some or all of the amount incurred, though delaying the journey back to lane.</li>
<li>To maximize the distance covered, due to <a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed">movement speed caps</a>, use the ability when Homeguard's movement speed has dropped approximately below 500. This will allow <b>Senna</b> and any allies following her to keep a form of haste for a particularly long time.</li></ul></li>
<li>The haste and stealth combination can be highly effective in initiating ambushes from <a href="/en-us/Fog_of_War" class="mw-redirect" title="Fog of War">Fog of War</a>, since the number of teammates concealed can be difficult to discern.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
			</div>
			<div class="tabbertab" data-title="Map-Specific Differences " data-hash="Map-Specific_Differences_" style="display: none;">
				<p class="mw-empty-elt"> 
</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Map-Specific Differences</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">

<ul><li>Movement speed AP ratio changed to <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">7% per 100 AP</span>.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul>

<ul><li>The broad wave is a singular projectile that can be <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">destroyed</a></span>.
<ul><li>The narrow wave will be destroyed with it in the process.</li></ul></li>
<li>This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the start of the cast time.</li>
<li><b>Senna</b> reveals herself during the cast time.</li></ul>

<dl><dd><i>For the expanded patch notes, see <a href="/en-us/Senna/Patch_history" title="Senna/Patch history">here</a>.</i></dd></dl>
<div style="overflow:auto; max-height:500px; width:auto; margin:3px 0; border:1px solid var(--league-grey-2); padding:0 0.5em 0 0.5em; box-sizing:border-box; -moz-box-sizing:border-box; -moz-border-radius-topleft:0.5em; background:var(--body-mid); border-radius:4px;">
<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V26.05" title="V26.05">V26.05</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li>General
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Bug Fix:</b></span> Fixed a bug where her homeguard SFX started and stopped suddenly.</li></ul></li></ul>
<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V26.04" title="V26.04">V26.04</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Piercing Darkness" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Piercing_Darkness"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Piercing Darkness" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png/20px-Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png?e75f9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png/40px-Senna_Piercing_Darkness.png?e75f9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Piercing_Darkness">Piercing Darkness</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Base damage reduced to 30 / 55 / 80 / 105 / 130 from 30 / 60 / 90 / 120 / 150.</li>
<li>Damage bonus AD ratio increased to <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">60% <b>bonus</b> AD</span> from <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">40%</span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Last Embrace" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Last_Embrace"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Last Embrace" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Last_Embrace.png/20px-Senna_Last_Embrace.png?f3d0b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Last_Embrace.png/40px-Senna_Last_Embrace.png?f3d0b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Last_Embrace">Last Embrace</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Base damage reduced to 70 / 110 / 150 / 190 / 230 from 70 / 115 / 160 / 205 / 250.</li>
<li>Bonus AD ratio increased to <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">90% <b>bonus</b> AD</span> from <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">70%</span>.</li></ul></li></ul>
<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V26.03" title="V26.03">V26.03</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Absolution" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Absolution"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Absolution" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/20px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/40px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Absolution">Absolution</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Bug Fix:</b></span> Fixed an issue where it wouldn't convert excess crit chance from <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Yun Tal Wildarrows" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Yun_Tal_Wildarrows"><img alt="An icon for the item Yun Tal Wildarrows" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yun_Tal_Wildarrows_item.png/20px-Yun_Tal_Wildarrows_item.png?f1b01" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yun_Tal_Wildarrows_item.png/40px-Yun_Tal_Wildarrows_item.png?f1b01 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Yun_Tal_Wildarrows">Yun Tal Wildarrows</a></span></span> into lifesteal.</li></ul></li></ul>
<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V26.01" title="V26.01">V26.01</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Basic Attack" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Basic_Attack"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Basic Attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Basic_Attack">Basic Attack</a></span></span>

<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Absolution" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Absolution"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Absolution" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/20px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/40px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Absolution">Absolution</a></span></span> (Innate)
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Innate - Weakened Soul</b></span>: <b>Senna's</b> basic attacks and abilities on enemy champions apply <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span> for 4 seconds. <b>Senna's</b> next attack collects the <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span> and deals <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal"><span class="pp-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-bot-values="1;2;3;4;5;6;8;10;12;14;16" data-bot-key="%">1% – 16% (based on level)</span> of target's <b>current</b> health</span> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal"><b>bonus</b> physical damage</span></a></span>. The same target cannot be collected more than once every 4 seconds.</li>
<li>Enemy <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion">champions</a></span>, large <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span> and large <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monster"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monsters</a></span> that die near <b>Senna</b> spawn a <i>Mist Wraith</i> for 8 seconds. Epic monsters spawn 2 <i>Mist Wraiths</i> instead. Small <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span> and lesser <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monster"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monsters</a></span> have a 20% chance to spawn <i>Mist Wraiths</i>, reduced to 5.<small>5</small>% chance on those that <b>Senna</b> kills. <b>Senna</b> can basic attack a <i>Mist Wraith</i> to destroy it, gaining <span class="inline-image label-after" style="display:inline;color:#E2BA3D;white-space:pre;text-shadow:-1px 0 black,0 1px black,1px 0 black,0 -1px black;" data-param=""><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Gold" title="An icon representing Gold"><img alt="An icon representing Gold" src="/en-us/images/Gold_colored_icon.svg?103a5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="48" data-file-height="48"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;">3</span></span> and collecting its <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span>.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Absolution</b></span>: Each stack of <span style="color: #26DFB0; white-space:normal">Mist</span> grants <b>Senna</b> <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">1 <b>bonus</b> attack damage</span></span>. For every 20 stacks, <b>Senna</b> also gains <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> 25 <b>bonus</b> range</span> and <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/15px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/30px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orangered; white-space:normal">15% critical strike chance</span></span>.
