<ul><li>In Senna's case, <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Absolution" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Absolution"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Absolution" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/20px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/40px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Absolution">Absolution</a></span></span> infinitely stacks her <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">attack damage</span>, range, lifesteal and the shield of <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Dawning Shadow" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Dawning_Shadow"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Dawning Shadow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Dawning_Shadow.png/20px-Senna_Dawning_Shadow.png?46c50" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Dawning_Shadow.png/40px-Senna_Dawning_Shadow.png?46c50 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Dawning_Shadow">Dawning Shadow</a></span></span>.</li></ul></li>
<li>Senna is an example of a champion that was present in the lore before they were developed into a playable champion: appearing as a recurring character in <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Lucian" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Lucian"><img alt="An icon representing Lucian" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lucian_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Lucian_OriginalSquare.png?514f2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lucian_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Lucian_OriginalSquare.png?514f2 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Lucian">Lucian's</a></span></span> story since his release. Another example is <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Lissandra" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Lissandra"><img alt="An icon representing Lissandra" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lissandra_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Lissandra_OriginalSquare.png?fe62c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lissandra_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Lissandra_OriginalSquare.png?fe62c 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Lissandra">Lissandra</a></span></span>, who appeared in the <a href="/en-us/Journal_of_Justice" class="mw-redirect" title="Journal of Justice">Journal of Justice</a>.
<ul><li>She is also part of the alternative universes of <a href="/en-us/High_Noon" class="mw-redirect" title="High Noon">High Noon</a> and <a href="/en-us/PROJECT" class="mw-redirect" title="PROJECT">PROJECT</a> without having any belonging skins before her release.</li></ul></li>
<li>Senna is the second champion that cannot increase a stat through leveling up, after <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Thresh" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Thresh"><img alt="An icon representing Thresh" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Thresh_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Thresh_OriginalSquare.png?9ef1d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Thresh_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Thresh_OriginalSquare.png?9ef1d 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Thresh">Thresh</a></span></span> and his <span style="color:yellow; white-space:normal">armor</span>. In her case, it is <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">attack damage</span> because of her passive, <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Absolution" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Absolution"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Absolution" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/20px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/40px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Absolution">Absolution</a></span></span>.
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Bel'Veth" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Bel%27Veth"><img alt="An icon representing Bel'Veth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png?88288" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png?88288 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Bel%27Veth">Bel'Veth</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Briar" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Briar"><img alt="An icon representing Briar" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Briar_OriginalSquare.png?37f17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Briar_OriginalSquare.png?37f17 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Briar">Briar</a></span></span> were the next champions to be released who cannot increase a stat through leveling up. These stats are <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Bel'Veth" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Bel%27Veth"><img alt="An icon representing Bel'Veth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png?88288" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Bel%27Veth_OriginalSquare.png?88288 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Bel%27Veth">Bel'Veth</a></span></span>'s <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">attack speed</span> and <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Briar" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Briar"><img alt="An icon representing Briar" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Briar_OriginalSquare.png?37f17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Briar_OriginalSquare.png?37f17 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Briar">Briar</a></span></span>'s <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">health regeneration</span>.</li></ul></li>
<li>Senna (optionally with <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Lucian" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Lucian"><img alt="An icon representing Lucian" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lucian_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Lucian_OriginalSquare.png?514f2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lucian_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Lucian_OriginalSquare.png?514f2 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Lucian">Lucian</a></span></span>) has a <a href="/en-us/Nemesis_Quest" title="Nemesis Quest">Nemesis Quest</a> against <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Thresh" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Thresh"><img alt="An icon representing Thresh" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Thresh_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Thresh_OriginalSquare.png?9ef1d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Thresh_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Thresh_OriginalSquare.png?9ef1d 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Thresh">Thresh</a></span></span>.<sup id="cite_ref-Quest_2-0" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-Quest-2"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>2<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup>
<ul><li>Senna's (and Lucian's) reward is called <span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Purity..._peace_buff.png/20px-Purity..._peace_buff.png?6fe4e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Purity..._peace_buff.png/40px-Purity..._peace_buff.png?6fe4e 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <i>Purity… peace</i>: <i>"Thresh has finally been allowed to pass. This unit absorbed some of his power […]."</i></li></ul></li>
<li>Senna has among one of the longest attack frames in game, at 0.<small>5</small> seconds, while most champions are between 0.<small>2</small> and 0.<small>3</small> seconds.<sup id="cite_ref-3" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-3"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>3<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup></li>
<li>Her name comes from Arabic سناء <i>Sanāʼ</i> "brightness, sublimity",<sup id="cite_ref-4" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-4"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>4<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup> from root <i>s-n-y</i> (> <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="//en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sin_(mythology)">Sin</a> "moon" & <i>seneh</i> "<a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="//en.wikipedia.org/wiki/burning_bush">burning bush</a>").<sup id="cite_ref-5" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-5"><span class="cite-bracket">[</span>5<span class="cite-bracket">]</span></a></sup></li>
<li>The movement speed buff from <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Absolution" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Absolution"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Absolution" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/20px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution.png/40px-Senna_Absolution.png?aef6a 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Absolution">Absolution</a></span></span> is called <span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution_2.png/20px-Senna_Absolution_2.png?ab1f4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Absolution_2.png/40px-Senna_Absolution_2.png?ab1f4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <i>Essence Tap</i>.</li></ul>

</div><div class="hidden-metadata navigation-not-searchable"><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack windup</span></div>
The <b>attack windup</b> is a portion of the <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Basic_Attack.png" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a> animation that must play out in order to launch it. For <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">projectile</a></span> basic attacks, the windup usually aligns with drawing the projectile on-screen.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The attack windup is displayed as a percentage, and any windup modifier is listed as a decimal next to it.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack speed ratio</span></div>
<p>The <b>Attack speed ratio (AS ratio)</b> adjusts the effectiveness of bonus AS from all sources. It is usually equal to the unit's base AS (level 1 with no bonuses), but tuning to a higher or lower relative value translates to more or less bonus AS received compared to other units with the same base AS. 
</p>
<center><big>Total AS = Base AS + Bonus AS × <span style="color: #D929D9; white-space:normal"><b>AS Ratio</b></span></big><br><i>(All values in decimal form)</i></center><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The ingame stats HUD displays the <b>AS ratio</b> instead of base AS to communicate this comparative effectiveness. The Wiki opts to always list both stats and show the <b>AS ratio</b> as "N/A" if the two are equal.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gameplay_radius.png/44px-Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Gameplay radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>gameplay radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that most closely resembles the concept of a 'hitbox', and is the radius used for <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range">edge range</a></span> effects, which include <a href="/en-us/Basic_attacks" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic attacks">basic attacks</a>, <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">line collision missiles</a>, rectangular AOEs, and others. The gameplay radius determines the reach of both incoming and outgoing effects: for example, enemies are within a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> basic attack range</span> based on the edge of their gameplay radius and vice versa.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_radius.png/44px-Selection_radius.png?7345c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_radius.png?7345c 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>selection radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the horizontally furthest point from the center of their model that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Pathing_radius.png/44px-Pathing_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Pathing_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Pathing radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>pathing radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the gameplay area they occupy for unit-collision and pathfinding logic. A unit's center cannot intersect with another unit's <b>pathing radius</b>, unless one of them is <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ghosted"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit_collision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/20px-Ghost.png?ee615" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/40px-Ghost.png?ee615 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit_collision">ghosted</a></span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_height.png/44px-Selection_height.png?8e760" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="43" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_height.png?8e760 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="71"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection height</span></div>
A unit's <b>selection height</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the vertically furthest point from the center of their model at the ground that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Gameplay in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a> takes place in two dimensions no matter the visuals. However, a virtual <i>height</i> dimension that is perpendicular to the ground creates the game's three-dimensional view, which in combination with the camera's perspective necessitates the usage of the <b>selection height</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Acquisition_range.png/44px-Acquisition_range.png?72c63" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Acquisition_range.png?72c63 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Acquisition radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>acquisition range</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the distance at which they will acquire <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attack</a></span> targets when a target unit is not specified by the player.
</p>
<ul><li>Auto-attacking <i>automatically</i> orders an idle champion to acquire enemies within this range. This can be disabled in the <a href="/en-us/Settings" title="Settings">Settings</a>.</li>
<li>Attack-move commands scan for targets within this range while moving toward a given location.</li></ul>
<p><b>Acquisition range</b> is calculated from the champion's <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Er"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> edge to the edge of other units.<br>
<span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:inherit; white-space:normal">Attack range</span></span> bonuses modify the champion's <b>acquisition range</b> by the same amount.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bottom_icon.png/44px-Bottom_icon.png?6d4b2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bottom_icon.png/88px-Bottom_icon.png?6d4b2 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Bottom</span></div>
Within a <a href="/en-us/Drafted_team" class="mw-redirect" title="Drafted team">drafted team</a>, the <i>Bottom Carry</i> is one of the two champions assigned to the bottom lane alongside the <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Support"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Category:Support_champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Support" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Support_icon.png/20px-Support_icon.png?af1ff" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Support_icon.png/40px-Support_icon.png?af1ff 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Category:Support_champion">Support</a></span>. Being the most vulnerable, the <i>Bottom Carry</i> has to acquire as much gold as possible to purchase key items that will greatly increase their fighting potential.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Within a duo lane, the optimal strategy for earning gold is to designate a single champion to <a href="/en-us/Farm" class="mw-redirect" title="Farm">farm</a> while the other is recommended to purchase an <a href="/en-us/Category:Gold_income_items" title="Category:Gold income items">economy item</a>. The <i>Bottom Carry</i> is expected to fulfill the former designation: the position is made for champions that highly depend on item-based power spikes.</p>
<p>
<span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Marksman"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Marksman"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Marksman" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Marksman_icon.png/20px-Marksman_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Marksman_icon.png/40px-Marksman_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Marksman" class="mw-redirect">Marksmen</a></span> are the most likely champions to be selected in the <i>Bottom Carry</i> position.</p></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Support_icon.png/44px-Support_icon.png?af1ff" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Support_icon.png/88px-Support_icon.png?af1ff 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Support</span></div>
Within a <a href="/en-us/Drafted_team" class="mw-redirect" title="Drafted team">drafted team</a>, the <i>Support</i> is one of the two champions assigned to the bottom lane alongside the <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Bottom"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Category:Bottom_champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Bottom" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bottom_icon.png/20px-Bottom_icon.png?6d4b2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bottom_icon.png/40px-Bottom_icon.png?6d4b2 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Category:Bottom_champion">Bottom Carry</a></span>. This role's initial goal is to assist their more vulnerable team mate through the earliest stages of the game, and is a position that suits champions with either utility, disengage or high base damage.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Within a duo lane, the optimal strategy for earning gold is to designate a single champion to <a href="/en-us/Farm" class="mw-redirect" title="Farm">farm</a> while the other is recommended to purchase an <a href="/en-us/Category:Gold_income_items" title="Category:Gold income items">economy item</a>. The <i>Support</i> is expected to fulfill the latter designation: consequently, the position is not suitable for champions that are highly dependent on item-based power spikes. The <i>Support</i> is also expected to be the primary contributor to the team's <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sight_icon.png/20px-Sight_icon.png?0aaf0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sight_icon.png?0aaf0 2x" data-file-width="26" data-file-height="26"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight">vision</a></span>.</p>
<p>
<span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Enchanter"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Enchanter"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Enchanter" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/20px-Controller_icon.png?728f3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/40px-Controller_icon.png?728f3 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Enchanter" class="mw-redirect">Enchanters</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Catcher"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Catcher"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Catcher" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/20px-Controller_icon.png?728f3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/40px-Controller_icon.png?728f3 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Catcher" class="mw-redirect">Catchers</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Warden"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_classes/Tank#Wardens"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Warden" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/20px-Tank_icon.png?d2561" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/40px-Tank_icon.png?d2561 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_classes/Tank#Wardens">Wardens</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Burst"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Burst"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Burst" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/20px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/40px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Burst" class="mw-redirect">Burst Mages</a></span> are the most likely champions to be selected in the <i>Support</i> position.</p></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Marksman_icon.png/44px-Marksman_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Marksman_icon.png/88px-Marksman_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Marksman</span></div>
<p><i>Marksmen</i> (formerly "Carries") excel at dealing reliable sustained damage at range (usually through basic attacks) while constantly skirting the edge of danger. Although Marksmen have the ability to stay relatively safe by kiting their foes, they are very fragile and are extremely reliant on powerful item purchases to become true damage threats.
</p>
<p>
At present, Marksmen do not have any official subclasses. The following have been considered:
</p><ul><li>Demolisher</li>
<li>Scrapper</li></ul>
Examples

font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/44px-Controller_icon.png?728f3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/88px-Controller_icon.png?728f3 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Enchanter</span></div>
<i>Controllers</i> are defensive casters that oversee the battlefield by protecting and opening up opportunities for their allies.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<i>Enchanters</i> focus on amplifying their allies' effectiveness by directly augmenting them and defending them from incoming threats. Enchanters themselves are often quite fragile and bring relatively low damage to the table, meaning they really only shine when grouped together with others.</p>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><dl><dt>Examples</dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Janna" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Janna"><img alt="An icon representing Janna" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Janna_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Janna_OriginalSquare.png?ec2a0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Janna_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Janna_OriginalSquare.png?ec2a0 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Janna">Janna</a></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Sona" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sona"><img alt="An icon representing Sona" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sona_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Sona_OriginalSquare.png?72d48" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sona_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Sona_OriginalSquare.png?72d48 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Sona">Sona</a></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Soraka" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Soraka"><img alt="An icon representing Soraka" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Soraka_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Soraka_OriginalSquare.png?0c2df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Soraka_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Soraka_OriginalSquare.png?0c2df 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Soraka">Soraka</a></span></span><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/44px-Controller_icon.png?728f3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/88px-Controller_icon.png?728f3 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Support (Legacy)</span></div>
<b>Support</b> refers to a broad roster of champions who support their allies. As this description is better suited to the champion's role within a drafted team, individual supports can vary wildly from champions that can create opportunities for their allies by disrupting the enemy, defensive casters whose abilities empower their allies and more durable champions that hold their team's front line.

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Marksman_icon.png/44px-Marksman_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Marksman_icon.png/88px-Marksman_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Marksman (Legacy)</span></div>
<p><b>Marksman</b> (formerly known as 'Carry') excel at dealing reliable sustained damage at range (usually through basic attacks) while constantly skirting the edge of danger.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/44px-Mana_resource.png?5be85" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/88px-Mana_resource.png?5be85 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Mana</span></div>
<p><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <b>Mana</b></span> (also known as <b>MP</b>) is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that is the resource of many <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champions</a> necessary to cast most of their <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>. Mana can be restored via <a href="/en-us/Mana_regeneration" title="Mana regeneration">mana regeneration</a> and some <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>, <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a>, <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buffs</a>.<br><br><b>Mana</b> is represented in-game by the blue bar within the HUD, indicating the champion's <b>current</b> mana and <b>maximum</b> mana. <b>Current</b> mana is reduced by expenditure through paying an ability's mana <i>cost</i>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ranged_role.png/44px-Ranged_role.png?62375" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ranged_role.png/88px-Ranged_role.png?62375 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Ranged</span></div>
<p><b>Ranged</b> champions have a basic attack <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> range</span> usually beyond 300 units. Many deal damage through projectiles, which are subject to mitigating effects like <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Yasuo" data-ability="Wind Wall" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall"><img alt="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/20px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/40px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall">Wind Wall</a></span></span>. Some champions can shift between a ranged and melee form, and certain items/runes differ for ranged characters.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/44px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/88px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Edge range</span></div>
<p><b>Edge range</b> is calculated from the <b>edge</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>edge</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Edge range is mostly used for <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attacks</a>; <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Direction-targeted" title="Targeting">skill shots</a>; and point-blank areas of effect (including <a href="/en-us/Aura" title="Aura">auras</a>).</li>
<li>These become <i>more</i> effective against large champions, as the source gains more reach against them. This may be favorable or unfavorable: durable champions tend to be larger and thus easier to hit, and frail champions tend to be smaller and more difficult to hit.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/44px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Basic attack</span></div>
The <b>basic attack</b> (or "auto") is the default means by which a unit deals damage, usually equaling <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">100% AD</span></span> <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span>. <b>Basic attacks</b> are normally unit-targeted <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range">edge range</a></span> spells, and the <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> attack range</span> stat determines their reach.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The caster must stand still to complete a brief <i>windup</i> before launching a <b>basic attack</b>. Depending on the caster:
</p><ul><li>If a caster's attacks are non-projectile (e.g. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Melee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Melee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Melee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/20px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/40px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Melee" class="mw-redirect">melee</a></span>) launching the attack deals damage immediately.</li>
<li>If a caster's attacks are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">projectile</a></span>, launching the attack sends a projectile that follows the target and deals damage upon striking them.</li></ul>
The caster then incurs a brief cooldown, based on their <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_speed" title="Attack speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/15px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/30px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17 2x" data-file-width="56" data-file-height="56"></a></span> <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">attack speed</span></span>. Basic attacks' damage may trigger <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">on-hit effects</a></span> only upon dealing damage. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-attack" src="/en-us/images/On-attack_icon.svg?88ec8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking">On-attack</a></span> effects will always trigger upon the attack's <i>windup</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/44px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Projectile</span></div>
<p>A <b>projectile</b> or <b>missile</b> is any entity not classified as a unit (<i><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion">champion</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minion</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monster"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monster</a></span>, etc.</i>) that travels at any given velocity.
</p>
<ul><li>Moving units are <b>not</b> considered projectiles under any circumstance (<i>including <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dash"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Dash"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/20px-Dash.png?e5c61" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/40px-Dash.png?e5c61 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Dash">dashing</a></span> units, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect">airborne</a></span> units, or units thrown by some abilities such as <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Syndra" data-ability="Force of Will" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;"
