<li>Some abilities will <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Homing projectile destruction"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Homing projectile destruction" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/20px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/40px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">destroy</a></span> all currently incoming homing projectiles.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/44px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="37" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/88px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">On-hit effect</span></div>
<b>On-hit</b> is an umbrella term for a type of effect that triggers on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">basic damage</a></span>, or generally upon a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attack</a></span> or certain attack-like <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_ability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability" src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability">ability</a></span> hitting a target. Most on-hit effects deal <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">proc damage</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Default damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Default damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/20px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/40px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">default damage</a></span>, which are non-reactive (= the effects don't trigger more effects).<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Critical strikes"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/20px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/40px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Critical_strike">Critical strikes</a></span> are <b>not</b> on-hit effects. An ability listed as applying on-hit effects cannot critically strike unless otherwise stated.</li>
<li><span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> Life steal</span></span> is <b>not</b> an on-hit effect. Damage from on-hit effects normally does not apply life steal, unless those effects deal <i>basic damage</i> or are special-cased to benefit from life steal.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul>

<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><hr>The ability counterpart to <b>on-hit effects</b> are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">ability effects</a></span>, which apply on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/20px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/40px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_damage">ability damage</a></span>.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/On-attack_icon.svg?88ec8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">On-attack</span></div>
<i>On-attack</i> effects refer to various instances that are triggered by the user when they finish their basic attack windup.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Unlike on-hit effects, on-attack effects do not require the user to land their basic attacks, only to finish their windup. Abilities that trigger on-attack effects will do so upon successfully hitting the target.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/44px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/88px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Critical strike</span></div>
<b>Critical strike</b> refers to an effect that deals increased damage under specific circumstances, denoted as <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_damage_icon.png/15px-Critical_strike_damage_icon.png?4899a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_damage_icon.png/30px-Critical_strike_damage_icon.png?4899a 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> </span> <span style="color: #B4814C; white-space:normal">critical strike damage</span>. The most common form of critical strike occurs on <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attacks</a></span>, which triggers based on <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/15px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/30px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orangered; white-space:normal">critical strike chance</span></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
By default, a critical strike deals 200% of the normal damage. Critical damage modifiers such as <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Infinity Edge" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Infinity_Edge"><img alt="An icon for the item Infinity Edge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Infinity_Edge_item.png/20px-Infinity_Edge_item.png?71b4c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Infinity_Edge_item.png/40px-Infinity_Edge_item.png?71b4c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Infinity_Edge">Infinity Edge</a></span></span> can increase this percentage.</p>

<i>Basic damage</i> is the damage dealt by most basic attacks, and a select few abilities. Most sources of <i>basic damage</i> have the <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage">physical damage</a></span> sub-type, but this is not guaranteed.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>

<li><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Physical_Damage_Shield.png" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Physical_Damage_Shield.png/20px-Physical_Damage_Shield.png?71222" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Physical_Damage_Shield.png/40px-Physical_Damage_Shield.png?71222 2x" data-file-width="121" data-file-height="121"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Shield#Physical_shields" title="Shield">Physical shields</a></li>
<li><span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Death's Dance" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death%27s_Dance"><img alt="An icon for the item Death's Dance" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Death%27s_Dance_item.png/20px-Death%27s_Dance_item.png?e35e5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Death%27s_Dance_item.png/40px-Death%27s_Dance_item.png?e35e5 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Death%27s_Dance">Death's Dance</a></span></span></li></ul></li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/44px-Range_center.png?cbed4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/88px-Range_center.png?cbed4 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Centered range</span></div>
<p><b>Centered range</b> is calculated from the <b>center</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>center</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Centered range is used for most <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Unit-targeted" title="Targeting">unit-targeted</a> abilities.</li>
<li>It is <i>less</i> effective and may seem to have diminished reach against <a href="/en-us/Unit_size" title="Unit size">large</a> units.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/44px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Basic attack</span></div>
The <b>basic attack</b> (or "auto") is the default means by which a unit deals damage, usually equaling <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">100% AD</span></span> <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span>. <b>Basic attacks</b> are normally unit-targeted <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range">edge range</a></span> spells, and the <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> attack range</span> stat determines their reach.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The caster must stand still to complete a brief <i>windup</i> before launching a <b>basic attack</b>. Depending on the caster:
</p><ul><li>If a caster's attacks are non-projectile (e.g. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Melee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Melee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Melee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/20px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/40px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Melee" class="mw-redirect">melee</a></span>) launching the attack deals damage immediately.</li>
<li>If a caster's attacks are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">projectile</a></span>, launching the attack sends a projectile that follows the target and deals damage upon striking them.</li></ul>
The caster then incurs a brief cooldown, based on their <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_speed" title="Attack speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/15px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/30px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17 2x" data-file-width="56" data-file-height="56"></a></span> <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">attack speed</span></span>. Basic attacks' damage may trigger <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">on-hit effects</a></span> only upon dealing damage. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-attack" src="/en-us/images/On-attack_icon.svg?88ec8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking">On-attack</a></span> effects will always trigger upon the attack's <i>windup</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Champion ability</span></div>
A <b>champion ability</b> (often just <b>ability</b>) is a unique action performed by and only available to a specific <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion">champion</a></span>. All of these special moves available to a champion collectively constitute their <i>kit</i>. A skill point is earned each time the champion <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Experience_(champion)" title="Experience (champion)"><img src="/en-us/images/Experience_icon.svg?219bd" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="18" data-file-height="18"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Experience_(champion)" title="Experience (champion)">levels up</a></span>, which the player can spend on most abilities to learn them and rank them up to improve their potency.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Champion abilities</b> can have either or both <i>active</i> and <i>passive</i> effects:
</p><ul><li>Active effects are <i>cast</i> by using their respective <a href="/en-us/Hotkey" class="mw-redirect" title="Hotkey">hotkey</a> and selecting a valid target. Most abilities require spending an amount of <a href="/en-us/Ability_resource" title="Ability resource">resource</a>, such as <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #0099CC; white-space:normal">mana</span></span>.</li>
<li>Passive effects may simply be permanently available or are <i>cast</i> by fulfilling a requirement or using a specific command.</li></ul>
Most abilities incur a <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_icon.png?50d14" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Cooldown_icon.png?50d14 2x" data-file-width="20" data-file-height="20"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown">cooldown</a></span> after being cast, during which they cannot be used. This cooldown time is usually reduced by <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_haste" title="Ability haste"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_reduction_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_reduction_icon.png?27276" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_reduction_icon.png/30px-Cooldown_reduction_icon.png?27276 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #7ADECD; white-space:normal">ability haste</span></span>. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">Spell effects</a></span> may trigger only when a valid ability deals damage. On-cast effects trigger upon an ability's <i>cast time</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/44px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/88px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Champion</span></div>
<p><b>Champions</b> are the player-controlled characters in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a>. Each champion possesses unique abilities and <a href="/en-us/Champion_attributes" class="mw-redirect" title="Champion attributes">attributes</a>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Stack_icon.png?2cff8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="36" data-file-height="36"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Stack</span></div>
A <b>stack</b> refers to a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Buff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Buff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/20px-Promote.png?7b9a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/40px-Promote.png?7b9a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Buff">buff</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff">debuff</a></span> that can be increased in count under certain circumstances. Stacking effects with durations will refresh per instance, unless otherwise stated.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Stacking effects that time out may cause all stacks to expire at once or one by one in given intervals, depending on the source.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Champion ability</span></div>
A <b>champion ability</b> (often just <b>ability</b>) is a unique action performed by and only available to a specific <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion">champion</a></span>. All of these special moves available to a champion collectively constitute their <i>kit</i>. A skill point is earned each time the champion <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Experience_(champion)" title="Experience (champion)"><img src="/en-us/images/Experience_icon.svg?219bd" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="18" data-file-height="18"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Experience_(champion)" title="Experience (champion)">levels up</a></span>, which the player can spend on most abilities to learn them and rank them up to improve their potency.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Champion abilities</b> can have either or both <i>active</i> and <i>passive</i> effects:
</p><ul><li>Active effects are <i>cast</i> by using their respective <a href="/en-us/Hotkey" class="mw-redirect" title="Hotkey">hotkey</a> and selecting a valid target. Most abilities require spending an amount of <a href="/en-us/Ability_resource" title="Ability resource">resource</a>, such as <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #0099CC; white-space:normal">mana</span></span>.</li>
<li>Passive effects may simply be permanently available or are <i>cast</i> by fulfilling a requirement or using a specific command.</li></ul>
Most abilities incur a <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_icon.png?50d14" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Cooldown_icon.png?50d14 2x" data-file-width="20" data-file-height="20"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown">cooldown</a></span> after being cast, during which they cannot be used. This cooldown time is usually reduced by <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_haste" title="Ability haste"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_reduction_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_reduction_icon.png?27276" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_reduction_icon.png/30px-Cooldown_reduction_icon.png?27276 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #7ADECD; white-space:normal">ability haste</span></span>. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">Spell effects</a></span> may trigger only when a valid ability deals damage. On-cast effects trigger upon an ability's <i>cast time</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>

Unlike <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Vamp"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Vamp"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Drain" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png/20px-Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png?fb3f8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png/40px-Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png?fb3f8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Vamp">Vamp</a></span>, the <b>"applies life steal"</b> tag applies life steal directly and does not <span style="color: #60E08F; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Healing" title="Healing"><img src="/en-us/images/Heal_power_icon.svg?42353" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> heal</span></span> based on damage dealt and the life steal <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a>. Therefore healing modifiers that affect <i>life steal</i> also affect abilities with the <b>"applies life steal"</b> tag.</p>

<p><b>Monsters</b> are neutral units in <b>League of Legends</b>. Unlike <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span>, monsters do not fight for either team, and will only do so if <i>aggroed</i> (provoked) – with the exception of the <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" title="An icon representing Rift Scuttler"><img alt="An icon representing Rift Scuttler" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/20px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/40px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" class="mw-redirect" title="Rift Scuttler">Rift Scuttler</a></span></span>, which simply runs away when attacked.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/44px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Minion</span></div>
<p><b>Minions</b> are autonomous units that spawn periodically from their nexus and advance along the lanes toward the enemy nexus. They <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a> any enemy unit or structure they find in their way, but can be killed for <span class="inline-image label-after" style="display:inline;color:#E2BA3D;white-space:pre;text-shadow:-1px 0 black,0 1px black,1px 0 black,0 -1px black;" data-param=""><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Gold" title="An icon representing Gold"><img alt="An icon representing Gold" src="/en-us/images/Gold_colored_icon.svg?103a5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="48" data-file-height="48"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;">gold</span></span>.<br>There are four kind of <b>minions</b>: <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Melee_minion" title="An icon representing Melee minion"><img alt="An icon representing Melee minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Melee_MinionSquare.png/20px-Blue_Melee_MinionSquare.png?df3d6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Melee_MinionSquare.png/40px-Blue_Melee_MinionSquare.png?df3d6 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Melee_minion" title="Melee minion">melee minions</a></span></span>, <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Caster_minion" title="An icon representing Caster minion"><img alt="An icon representing Caster minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Caster_MinionSquare.png/20px-Blue_Caster_MinionSquare.png?a8af8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Caster_MinionSquare.png/40px-Blue_Caster_MinionSquare.png?a8af8 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Caster_minion" title="Caster minion">caster minions</a></span></span>, <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Siege_minion" title="An icon representing Siege minion"><img alt="An icon representing Siege minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Siege_MinionSquare.png/20px-Blue_Siege_MinionSquare.png?40aa6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Siege_MinionSquare.png/40px-Blue_Siege_MinionSquare.png?40aa6 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Siege_minion" title="Siege minion">siege minions</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Super_minion" title="An icon representing Super minion"><img alt="An icon representing Super minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png/20px-Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png?40fac" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png/40px-Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png?40fac 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Super_minion" title="Super minion">super minions</a></span></span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/44px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/88px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Critical strike</span></div>
<b>Critical strike</b> refers to an effect that deals increased damage under specific circumstances, denoted as <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_damage_icon.png/15px-Critical_strike_damage_icon.png?4899a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_damage_icon.png/30px-Critical_strike_damage_icon.png?4899a 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> </span> <span style="color: #B4814C; white-space:normal">critical strike damage</span>. The most common form of critical strike occurs on <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attacks</a></span>, which triggers based on <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/15px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_chance_icon.png/30px-Critical_strike_chance_icon.png?4899a 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orangered; white-space:normal">critical strike chance</span></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
By default, a critical strike deals 200% of the normal damage. Critical damage modifiers such as <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Infinity Edge" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Infinity_Edge"><img alt="An icon for the item Infinity Edge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Infinity_Edge_item.png/20px-Infinity_Edge_item.png?71b4c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Infinity_Edge_item.png/40px-Infinity_Edge_item.png?71b4c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Infinity_Edge">Infinity Edge</a></span></span> can increase this percentage.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png/44px-Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png?fb3f8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Ravenous_Hunter_rune.png?fb3f8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Drain</span></div>
<p><b>Drain</b>, better known as <b>Vamp</b>, is a term for various <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Healing"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Healing"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Heal" src="/en-us/images/Heal_power_icon.svg?42353" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Healing">healing</a></span> effects that are based on damage dealt, but are not <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell vamp"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Vamp#Spell_vamp"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell vamp" src="/en-us/images/Spell_vamp_icon.svg?684b2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Vamp#Spell_vamp">spell vamp</a></span> or <span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> life steal</span></span>. <b>Drain</b> effects benefit from <span style="color: #60E08F; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Heal_and_shield_power" title="Heal and shield power"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Heal_and_shield_power_icon.png/15px-Heal_and_shield_power_icon.png?fa76e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Heal_and_shield_power_icon.png/30px-Heal_and_shield_power_icon.png?fa76e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> Heal and Shield Power</span></span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png/44px-Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Taric_Cosmic_Radiance.png?a8ab9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Invulnerability</span></div>
<p>A unit that is <b>Invulnerable</b> reduces all damage taken to <b>0</b> and prevents effects that trigger from damage.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Structure_icon.png/44px-Structure_icon.png?41191" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Structure_icon.png?41191 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Structure</span></div>
A <b>structure</b> is a fixed, immobile unit on the battlefield that exists to control a team's territory and protect their base. Structures include <b>turrets</b>, <b>inhibitors</b>, and the <b>Nexus</b>. The structure unit type is considered an invalid target to most abilities and spells, and can normally only be damaged with <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attacks"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attacks</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Turrets</b> are heavy fortifications that defend a part of territory. They provide vision of the area and autonomously fire homing bolts at nearby enemies, establishing a defensive ground for allies.<br><br><b>Inhibitors</b> are stone platforms containing an arcane crystal. They are located in each team's base and are each protected by an inhibitor turret standing before them in the same lane. When a team's inhibitor is destroyed, allied <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Super_minion" title="An icon representing Super minion"><img alt="An icon representing Super minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png/20px-Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png?40fac" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png/40px-Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png?40fac 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Super_minion" title="Super minion">super minions</a></span></span> will begin spawning in the waves set in the respective lane.<br><br>The <b>Nexus</b> is a massive stone platform containing a large arcane crystal. One is located in each team's base and each are protected by two Nexus turrets standing before them. When a team's Nexus is destroyed, they are defeated and the opposing team scores victory of the match, thus ending the game.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/44px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Dodge</span></div>
<b>Dodging</b> an instance of damage will <i>skip</i> its damage event entirely, preventing it from being taken and effects that trigger from damage. <i>Dodge</i> takes precedence over <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">block</a></span>, but not <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect">blind</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Effects that <i>dodge</i> damage will only <i>dodge</i> instances that are <i>dodgeable</i>. Note that these are specified in the ability details on the Wiki. 
<br><br>Basic attacks and abilities that apply on-hit effects are always <i>dodged</i>, unless otherwise stated.</p>
<p>
<i>This effect is exclusive to <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Jax" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Jax"><img alt="An icon representing Jax" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Jax_OriginalSquare.png?6209d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Jax_OriginalSquare.png?6209d 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span bold;">Block</span></div>
<b>Blocking</b> an instance of damage will reduce its value to <b>0</b>, but does not prevent effects that trigger from damage. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect">Blind</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">dodge</a></span> take precedence over <i>block</i>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Effects that <i>block</i> damage will only <i>block</i> instances that are <i>blockable</i>. Note that these are specified in the ability details on the Wiki.
<br><br>Basic attacks and abilities that apply on-hit effects are always <i>blocked</i>, unless otherwise stated.</p>
<p>
<i>This effect is exclusive to <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Shen" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shen"><img alt="An icon representing Shen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Shen_OriginalSquare.png?7795f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Shen_OriginalSquare.png?7795f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Shen">Shen's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Shen" data-ability="Spirit's Refuge" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shen#Spirit's_Refuge"><img alt="An icon for Shen's ability Spirit's Refuge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Shen#Spirit's_Refuge">Spirit's Refuge</a></span></span></span> and is similar though mechanically different to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">Dodge</a></span>.</i></p></div></div></div>
